steps.title: Notice the target expression
steps.content: The target is $14x-1$, which is exactly $2$ times the left side of the given equation $7x-\frac{1}{2}=-8$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The result is $-16$, so D is correct. This shortcut avoids solving for $x$ separately; the requested expression is directly produced by doubling the equation.
